# GlowLab

> GlowLab makes clinically tested vitamin C skincare, sold direct to consumers in the US and EU.

## Key pages

- [Vitamin C Serum](https://glowlab.example/serum): our flagship product
- [Ingredient research](https://glowlab.example/research): clinical studies behind the formulas
- [FAQ](https://glowlab.example/faq): shipping, returns, and usage questions
